scripts.refresh:core: cd @randsum/core && bun install && bun run build
scripts.refresh:dice: cd @randsum/dice && bun install && bun update && bun run build
scripts.refresh:notation: cd @randsum/notation && bun install && bun update && bun run build
scripts.refresh:tower: cd @randsum/tower && bun install && bun update && bun run build
scripts.refresh:customdice: cd @randsum/customdice && bun install && bun update && bun run build
scripts.refresh:all: bun refresh:core && bun refresh:dice && bun refresh:notation && bun refresh:tower && bun refresh:customdice
